data.body:
Soap played up theatrics, sliding the glass over before relaxing both hands over his crotch, "I'm Soap."

An uneven, handsome, almost malicious smile broke onto the man's face, "You can call me Ghost."

"Spooky."
"And you're, slippery?"
Soap laughed, "Gimme five minutes and you find out."
data.author: did:plc:muznpbneeg5f6v3ix77tauwz

data.body:
....

When Soap woke up, surprised he still woke up, his head felt light. His dick also ached, feeling bruised to all hell. It took him a moment of blinking blindly into the dappled sunlight that sprinkled onto his face before any recollection of *something* started coming back to him.

data.body:
I know it is a common refrain here about the rich got tax breaks but it is just not true. 
The tax bracket rates stayed the same (10, 12, 22 etc to 37%). 
For example 2024 tax year rate on $731k now in 2025 tax year is $751k. 
Every bracket had the top number raised to account for inflation.
